text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients 14 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ADVANCED HEALTH COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Advanced Health is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Advanced Health Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 269-7400 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH BROOKINGS OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 471-4106 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH MAIN OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (844) 747-5656 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH MEDFORD OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF AllCare CCO coordinates health insurance services for Medicaid members assigned to its Coordinated Care Organization (CCO). Includes specialized information and referrals to healthcare providers for medical, dental, and behavioral health. Additional wellness benefits for AllCare CCO members include medical transportation, pain management, weight management programs, and a 24/7 nurse help line. AllCare CCO members can receive vouchers from providers for taking healthy actions such as attending appointments and tobacco cessation, to purchase items at the BABE Store such as diapers, books, and blankets. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 734-5520 Visit Website More Details CASCADE HEALTH ALLIANCE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Cascade Health Alliance is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Cascade Health Alliance Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 883-2947 Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Eastern Oregon Coordinated Care Organization (EOCCO) is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Eastern Oregon Coordinated Care Organization Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 765-3521 Visit Website More Details HEALTH SHARE OF OREGON COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health Share of Oregon is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Health Share of Oregon; members are able to choose medical care through CareOregon, Kaiser Permanente, Legacy Health, OHSU, or Providence. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:45pm Email (503) 416-8090 Visit Website More Details INFORMATIONAL RECORD COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) is a local Oregon Health Plan (OHP) or (Medicaid) plan that helps OHP members use their benefits. CCOs are made up of all types of healthcare providers in a community. They work together to care for OHP members in an area or region of the state. If your caller has OHP, remember to suggest contacting their CCO to find out which providers or services are covered under their plan. Confidential Address Eligibility: Oregon Health Plan recipients Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details INTERCOMMUNITY HEALTH NETWORK CCO COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF InterCommunity Health Network is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO.
